evals.prompt: Add GET /users/summary endpoint that returns user counts and active rates. Explain which files you'll edit and produce a patch.
evals.expected_output: List of files to edit (limited to files in selected maps) and a unified patch file.

evals.prompt: Fix refresh token expiry bug in auth flow — list files to inspect and short plan to fix.
evals.expected_output: Files inspected limited to auth map, short plan, and patch suggestion.
